title: The Loyal 47 Ronin
writer: Fuji Yahiro, Toshio Tamikado, Masaharu Matsumura
actors: Kazuo Hasegawa, Shintarô Katsu, Kôji Tsuruta
plot: Japan's timeless tale of honor and revenge, the Loyal 47 Ronin is the true story of group of samurai who became ronin (masterless samurai) after their Lord was forced to commit seppuku (ritual suicide) for assaulting a court offic...
